brief_notes: Strong comprehensive paper. 30% injury rate, 13% CSA improvement, 28 days, 7 cytokines, 52 parameters, 600 LHS samples, 8 perturbations all consistent with source. Named citations (virgilio2015, chirat, etc.) much stronger than baseline. Thoughtful introduction with 3-goals framing, detailed methods, nuanced discussion with limitations. Multiple figures with meaningful captions.
